response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Cluster-wide scarcity confirmed with my SoC below survival threshold (17.3%); conservative policy mandates zero outbound sharing until recovery above 60%, and r3c2's request conflicts with immediate grid reconnection/load reduction priority.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=['r2c1'].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide scarcity confirmed. r3c1 SoC 17.3% and declining under 1 kW load. Upstream peers unable/unwilling to provide relief. Zero outbound sharing until SoC recovers above 60%. Immediate grid reconnection or load reduction required for survival. All inbound requests must be declined with urgency escalation..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
